summary: A long clip of a press conference. A man in a dark suit speaks at a lectern, flanked by other men in suits, in front of a backdrop bearing the Homeland Security Investigations badge. A lower banner shows the HSI and ICE wordmarks throughout. The footage stays on the speakers as they address the room.

script.scene: A man speaks at a lectern flanked by two others in front of an HSI badge backdrop, HSI and ICE wordmarks below.
A wider view shows additional officials standing behind the speaker at the lectern.
The press conference continues with the speaker at the lectern.
